name: @aura3d/animation-studio-web
description: Aura3D Animation Studio — the 3-pane NLE web shell (PRD §7). Vite + React + TypeScript. A real production studio shell whose dev backend (vite.config.ts middleware) loads the working EpisodeDocument via /api/document, applies Scene-Tool CLI commands as validated mutations, and triggers real renders served under /preview.
